description_long: This is a large, cylindrical wooden mug or tankard with a dark, weathered wood texture and reinforced by two wide, dark metallic bands around its circumference. The interior is a lighter, unfinished wood, suggesting it is designed to hold liquids. One side features a prominent, curved handle made of the same dark material as the bands, ergonomically shaped for gripping. The front displays a large, oval metallic medallion with a stylized insignia, possibly referencing a fantasy or gaming universe. The overall construction appears robust and medieval, suitable for use in a tavern or themed urban setting. The object is open at the top, with no visible lid or cover.
description: A large, dark wooden tankard with metal bands, a curved handle, and a decorative insignia medallion on the front. The interior is light wood and the top is open.
description_view_0: A view of the tankard showing its open top, dark wood staves, and metal bands, with no handle or insignia visible.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the oval medallion with a stylized insignia and the curved handle on the right side.
description_view_2: The back view focuses on the thick, curved handle attached vertically, with no insignia visible.
description_view_3: A side view showing the handle's full shape and attachment, with the metal bands and wood texture prominent.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops around top and bottom
